info.description: OpenAPI projection of the media pillar's REST contract. Authored as a ts-rest contract (src/contract/rest.ts); consumed directly by polyglot clients and via openapi-typescript by TS consumers.
info.title: @pops/media

get.summary: List the library (movies + TV shows) with filter / sort / pagination
List the distinct genres across the library

post.summary: Add a movie to the library by TMDB id (idempotent)

patch.summary: Refresh a library movie from TMDB

get.summary: Random unwatched movies to surface as a quick pick

post.summary: Add a TV show to the library by TheTVDB id (idempotent)

patch.summary: Refresh a library TV show from TheTVDB

get.summary: List movies with optional search / genre filters and pagination
Get a single movie by id
List the episodes of a season

post.summary: Create an episode under a season
Record impressions for one or more shelves

get.summary: Get the impression count + freshness multiplier for a shelf
List per-shelf impression counts within the recent window
List TV shows with optional search / status filters and pagination
Get a single TV show by id
List the seasons of a TV show

post.summary: Create a season under a TV show

get.summary: List watch history entries with optional filters and pagination

post.summary: Log a watch event (auto-removes from watchlist on completion)
Batch-log watch events for all aired episodes of a season or show
Watch-completion percentage for a batch of TV shows

get.summary: Per-season + overall watch progress for a TV show
List recent watch history enriched with media metadata
Get a single watch history entry by id
List watchlist entries with optional mediaType filter and pagination

post.summary: Add an item to the watchlist (idempotent on mediaType+mediaId)

get.summary: Check whether a media item is on the watchlist

delete.summary: Remove an entry from the watchlist

get.summary: Get a single watchlist entry by id
